calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PES-97-269206 Estate of Roscoe Simmons & PTR-15-298700 Simmons Family Trust
Appearances: Evan Cote (via court call) for (petitioner) David Simmons.

The Court stated that it needs courtesy copies for both cases. Mr. Cote stated that courtesy copies were personally delivered on 12/18/15. The Court requested that additional copies be delivered and took the motions to be relieved as counsel (in both case numbers) under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Continued To Jan-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Terminate Family Allowance
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court took the petition to terminate family allowance off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
